required_fields.question: What product or service is involved?
Do you have proof of purchase (invoice/receipt)?
What defect, failure, or harm occurred?
How did the seller or manufacturer respond?
What outcome do you want (refund, replacement, compensation, etc.)?
What was your job role and employment type?
How were you terminated, and was any reason provided?
What dues are pending (salary, gratuity, notice pay, etc.)?
Do you have appointment letter, salary slips, or other employment proof?
Has the employer responded to your request for dues or reinstatement?
Do you know who committed the act (name/identity), or is it unknown?
What evidence is available (messages, recordings, witnesses, documents)?
Have you approached police or filed any complaint/FIR?
Is there any immediate threat to your safety right now?
